nation: Chippewas of Kettle and Stony Point First Nation
economic_notes: Southwind Corporate Development Inc. operates a supermarket (Points Preference Supermarket Inc.), gas & convenience store (Kettle and Stony Point Gas & Convenience Inc.), and 9236058 Canada Inc. Indian Hills of Ipperwash Limited operates a golf course. Stony Point FSA Trust Fund holds $104M in portfolio investments restricted per Trust Fund Agreement.
notes: Consolidated entity includes Points Eagle Radio Inc., Chippewas of Kettle and Stony Point Settlement Trust (2016), and Chippewas of Kettle and Stony Point Clench Minors Trust (2021) as fully consolidated subsidiaries. Two GBEs (Southwind Corporate Development Inc. and Indian Hills of Ipperwash Limited) accounted for on modified equity basis. Large portfolio investments of $133M (cost) held primarily in Stony Point FSA Trust Fund ($104M) restricted for use per Trust Fund Agreement. Adopted PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations effective April 1, 2023 on modified retroactive basis — restated opening accumulated surplus by -$809,177. On November 20, 2023, Southwind Corporate Development Inc. assumed a $898,678 mortgage from the First Nation. Restricted cash includes $15.6M Clench settlement funds. No schedule of remuneration included in the provided financial statement text.
